[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No visible text appears in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- **Visible text:** None detected

# Notes

- The image is a photo of a person at a party/club scene; no UI text, captions, signage, or readable words are present.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with short, dark hair and black oval sunglasses is posing in a dimly lit nightclub. He is wearing a textured white polo shirt and a thin black beaded necklace. A silver watch with a black face is visible on his left wrist. His arms are resting on a dark railing in the foreground. The background is filled with a crowd of people, some dancing, illuminated by vibrant green and red neon lights and dramatic light beams cutting through the smoky atmosphere. The overall mood is energetic and stylish, with a focus on the subject against the lively backdrop. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, punctuated by the bright neon lights.
